parameters: You obtained the soul of the Red Dragon!
No~! The tips of my hair are singed~!
Now we have three boss souls, right?

That's for use over there... at that ruins! There was
a pedestal for souls, remember?

Right, right! Maybe we can proceed deeper into the
ruins once we have all three.
Then, let's go to the ruins~♪

By the way~... there's a lot of treasure here... it's
okay if I take a little, right?\i[12]

I heard on the news that the value of gold is
skyrocketing right now~

But there's nowhere to spend money even if we have
it...
Then what are we supposed to use it for...?

Maybe if we offer the three souls somewhere, the path
to the final boss will open!

There are still places we haven't been. Like the deep
north of the forest from the base coast.
Then, we have no choice but to go there...

By the way~... there's a lot of treasure here... it's
okay if I take a little, right?\i[12]

I heard on the news that the value of gold is
skyrocketing right now~

But there's nowhere to spend money even if we have
it...

By defeating the Red Dragon, you can now enter the
adventurer's town (small town).

Light a bonfire? (You can save and return at the
bonfire.)

You need a torch to light a bonfire.
(Let's make one at the workbench.)

I am one who challenged the Red Dragon long ago and
was defeated. My lingering regrets keep me from
passing on.

If only I had the legendary shield that blocks the Red
Dragon's Megaflare (fire attribute)...

I think it was in the eastern forest... Ah... I should
have prepared better. Rocks are blocking the path, so
I need a bomb.
And I should have leveled up to at least 30...

A shortcut from the magic circle to the entrance of
the lava cave has been unlocked.

There's a black rock here, but it doesn't look like it
can be destroyed with a pickaxe.

We'll need an Adamantoise Bomb... Let's make it at the
workbench.

Hey, where do you think you're going? You haven't
picked up the gold bars yet.\i[12]
